creator: tingox+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #13)

There is still a problem:
tingo@kg-core2$ cura
env: %%PYTHON_CMD%%: No such file or directory

tingo@kg-core2$ head -1 /usr/local/bin/cura
#!/usr/bin/env %%PYTHON_CMD%%

tingo@kg-core2$ pkg info Cura*
Cura-4.8.0_3,2
CuraEngine-4.8,1
